name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Greitens?=
subject: Fox News Sunday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,
Eric was featured on Fox News Sunday this morning as the "Power Player of the Week." We wanted to make sure you saw [this great interview with Chris Wallace](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=fc2314886b&e=84041254e6).
[](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=e80c33d31d&e=84041254e6)
Make sure to share this with your friends and to [follow Eric on Facebook](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=66e7a12787&e=84041254e6).
Thanks,
Team Greitens
Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108
Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on [Facebook](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=968b00a95e&e=84041254e6) and [Twitter](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=c08b8e8042&e=84041254e6). Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected with the campaign. If they become too much, you can [unsubscribe](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=987115fd29).

name: Tim Kaine
subject: deeply disturbing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek,

The reports that Attorney General Jeff Sessions met with the Russian Ambassador last fall -- and then misled the Senate about those meetings -- are deeply disturbing.

**I am calling on Mr. Sessions to go before the Senate Judiciary Committee to explain his misleading testimony on whether he had contact with Russian officials.[Derek, will you join me in urging Jeff Sessions to go before the Judiciary Committee?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=tcKzbOgoroRJK0a8dOrBBitp525%2F8gUI)**

We can't know for certain what Mr. Sessions and the Russian Ambassador discussed, but this development further underscores that we are getting more questions than answers on the Trump campaign's contact with Russia. I am urging Mr. Sessions to testify and explain his misleading answers. And if he refuses to do so, or does not explain his responses to my satisfaction, I will call for his resignation.

It seems like every week we learn of new, previously undisclosed, connections between members of the Trump administration and Russia. Only weeks ago, President Trump's chief national security advisor was forced to resign because he lied about his contacts with the Russian government. Now it's Jeff Sessions.

**It's clearer than ever that we need a full and independent investigation into these connections.**

**[Will you join me in urging Jeff Sessions to go before the Senate Judiciary Committee to explain his misleading testimony?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=PrbHh%2F3Qviuphs7ltalkpCtp525%2F8gUI)**

Thank you,
Tim
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ZF9ZsE5fk9hKRFSiMkeyxp1WLr%2FU3Ww9)
---
| Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=deEZxukABfxeW8H0t3zVcStp525%2F8gUI).
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

We can't know for certain what Mr. Sessions and the Russian Ambassador discussed, but this development further underscores that we are getting more questions than answers on the Trump campaign's contact with Russia. I am urging Mr. Sessions to testify and explain his misleading answers. And if he refuses to do so, or does not explain his responses to my satisfaction, I will call for his resignation. name: Team Maggie
subject: Getting dark money out of politics (add your name)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd18/2a380d31/15f72d0e/feed68/3588115890/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd18/2a380d31/15f72d0e/feed68/3588115890/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hi there,
One of Senator Hassan's first acts in Congress was to cosponsor a constitutional amendment to overturn _Citizens United_ , the disastrous Supreme Court decision that lets corporate special interests silence your voice and buy our elections.
It's simple -- our democracy should not be for sale to the highest bidder.
The good news is, you can join Senator Hassan and tell Congress to end _Citizens United_ by signing our petition. **It looks like you haven't had a chance to add your name yet, and the petition closes tomorrow. [Put your name down now, before the deadline, to say that you want to get dark money out of our elections](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd18/2a380d31/15f72d0e/feed69/3588115890/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://petitions.signforgood.com/endcitizensunited?code=hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201702_ecuja").**
Washington Republican groups -- including ones tied to the Koch Brothers -- have already pledged to spend up to $400 million to unseat Democrats in 2018. It has never been more important for you to make your voice heard.
[**Please, add your name before tomorrow's deadline to tell Congress to end _Citizens United_.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd18/2a380d31/15f72d0e/feed69/3588115890/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://petitions.signforgood.com/endcitizensunited?code=hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201702_ecuja")
Thank you,
Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd18/2a380d31/15f72d0e/feed6a/3588115890/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNzAyX2VjdWphIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNzAyMjZfZWN1amFfYWxsIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201702_ecuja?refcode=e20170226_ecuja_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd18/2a380d31/15f72d0e/feed6b/3588115890/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: New Executive Order to keep America SAFE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Show your support before the media attacks it. |

Friend, Because you care about keeping America safe, I want you to be the first to know that I just signed a NEW Executive Order on immigration: Temporarily Restricting immigration from six countries compromised by radical Islamic terrorism: Sudan, Syria, Iran, Libya, Somalia, and Yemen Momentarily Freezing travel for citizens of those countries who do not have approved U.S. visas Suspending the entire U.S. refugee program for 120 days to allow time to develop extreme vetting procedures
As your President, I made a solemn promise to keep America safe. And I will NEVER stop fighting until we implement the policies you -- and millions of Americans like you -- voted for. But I need you fighting by my side, Friend. Please sign your name on the official petition to show YOUR support for this critical national security policy. >> Just like before, you and I know that the media will do everything in their power to attack and distort this policy that America desperately needs. But I promise to never stop fighting back until we truly MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN! Because there is NOTHING more important than the safety and security of our country. Please sign your name on the official petition to show YOUR support for this critical national security policy. >> Thanks, Donald J. Trump President of the United States
ADD YOUR NAME

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.
Unsubscribe Or unsubscribe by email

Please sign your name on the official petition to show YOUR support for this critical national security policy. >>

name: Tom Perez
subject: Trump just signed a new Muslim ban. Add your name to fight back.
body:
This is un-American.
---
**Donald Trump's Muslim ban is a dark moment in American history. Tell Trump to rescind this order immediately:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Muslim-Ban1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170306_tp_nd&source=em_20170306_tp_nd")**
Donald Trump just signed an updated version of his Muslim ban. But don't let the second attempt ruin your first impression -- this ban is just as discriminatory and un-American as the last one.

**[Donald Trump's hateful, disgraceful Muslim ban goes against our core values as Americans. Add your name and join me to denounce it right now.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Muslim-Ban1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Donald+Trumps+hateful+disgraceful+Muslim&utm_campaign=em_20170306_tp_nd&source=em_20170306_tp_nd")**

This ban, like the last one, is unconstitutional. You don't have to take my word for it -- just ask the multiple federal courts that ruled against it the first time.

You would think that Trump might have taken a few minutes after that to read the Constitution. (I'd suggest starting with Article III for a refresher on the role of the judicial branch, and then move on to what the First Amendment says about freedom of religion.)

Instead, he's slapping a fresh coat of paint on an old, discriminatory policy.

**I'm confident the courts will rule against Donald Trump again soon. Until then, make sure he knows we're not backing down:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Muslim-Ban1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170306_tp_nd&source=em_20170306_tp_nd")**
Thanks.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c456/4067b0a/2d0844f6e/7e7c880d/2333417520/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170306_tp_nd&source=em_20170306_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c456/4067b0a/2d0844f6e/7e7c880a/2333417520/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170306_tp_nd&source=em_20170306_tp_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c456/4067b0a/2d0844f6e/7e7c880b/2333417520/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170306_tp_nd&source=em_20170306_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c456/4067b0a/2d0844f6e/7e7c8808/2333417520/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170306_tp_nd&source=em_20170306_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Democrats.org
subject: TONIGHT AT 6 P.M.: Rally at the White House to oppose Trump's Muslim ban
body:
Join us at the White House tonight!
---
Here's something you can do right now to make sure Trump knows we won't back down.

**[Tonight at 6 p.m., join Tom outside the White House to stand with our Muslim friends and neighbors and make our voices heard: this ban does not represent who we are as Americans.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Rally-Tonight?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+Tonight+at+6+pm+join+Tom+outside+the+Whi&utm_campaign=em_20170306_dnc_dc&source=em_20170306_dnc_dc")**

**As we've seen over the past few weeks, you can make a difference by showing up and speaking out. The rally will begin across the street from the White House, on Pennsylvania Ave NW between Madison & Jackson:**

**[RSVP](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Rally-Tonight?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+RSVP&utm_campaign=em_20170306_dnc_dc&source=em_20170306_dnc_dc")**
We hope to see you there!

The Democrats

\-------- Forwarded message -------
Sender: Tom Perez
Sent: Mon, Mar 6, 2017
Subject: Trump just signed a new Muslim ban. Add your name to fight back.

**Donald Trump's Muslim ban is a dark moment in American history. Tell Trump to rescind this order immediately:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Muslim-Ban1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170306_dnc_dc&source=em_20170306_dnc_dc")**
Donald Trump just signed an updated version of his Muslim ban. But don't let the second attempt ruin your first impression -- this ban is just as discriminatory and un-American as the last one.

**[Donald Trump's hateful, disgraceful Muslim ban goes against our core values as Americans. Add your name and join me to denounce it right now.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Muslim-Ban1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+Donald+Trumps+hateful+disgraceful+Muslim&utm_campaign=em_20170306_dnc_dc&source=em_20170306_dnc_dc")**

This ban, like the last one, is unconstitutional. You don't have to take my word for it -- just ask the multiple federal courts that ruled against it the first time.

You would think that Trump might have taken a few minutes after that to read the Constitution. (I'd suggest starting with Article III for a refresher on the role of the judicial branch, and then move on to what the First Amendment says about freedom of religion.)

Instead, he's slapping a fresh coat of paint on an old, discriminatory policy.

**I'm confident the courts will rule against Donald Trump again soon. Until then, make sure he knows we're not backing down:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Muslim-Ban1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170306_dnc_dc&source=em_20170306_dnc_dc")**
Thanks.

Tom

Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c457/4067b0a/2d08cea67/7e7c8ce5/767461787/VEsP/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170306_dnc_dc&source=em_20170306_dnc_dc"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.
clean_body: Join us at the White House tonight! Here's something you can do right now to make sure Trump knows we won't back down. "=\(null\&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utmmedium=email&utmsource=dnc&utmcontent=1+-+Tonight+at+6+pm+join+Tom+outside+the+Whi&utmcampaign=em20170306dncdc&source=em20170306dncdc") As we've seen over the past few weeks, you can make a difference by showing up and speaking out. The rally will begin across the street from the White House, on Pennsylvania Ave NW between Madison & Jackson: "=\(null\&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utmmedium=email&utmsource=dnc&utmcontent=2+-+RSVP&utmcampaign=em20170306dncdc&source=em20170306dncdc") We hope to see you there! The Democrats \-------- Forwarded message ------- Sender: Tom Perez Sent: Mon, Mar 6, 2017 Subject: Trump just signed a new Muslim ban. Add your name to fight back. Donald Trump's Muslim ban is a dark moment in American history. Tell Trump to rescind this order immediately: "=\(null\&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utmmedium=email&utmsource=dnc&utmcontent=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utmcampaign=em20170306dncdc&source=em20170306dncdc") Donald Trump just signed an updated version of his Muslim ban. But don't let the second attempt ruin your first impression -- this ban is just as discriminatory and un-American as the last one. "=\(null\&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utmmedium=email&utmsource=dnc&utmcontent=4+-+Donald+Trumps+hateful+disgraceful+Muslim&utmcampaign=em20170306dncdc&source=em20170306dncdc") This ban, like the last one, is unconstitutional. You don't have to take my word for it -- just ask the multiple federal courts that ruled against it the first time. You would think that Trump might have taken a few minutes after that to read the Constitution. (I'd suggest starting with Article III for a refresher on the role of the judicial branch, and then move on to what the First Amendment says about freedom of religion.) Instead, he's slapping a fresh coat of paint on an old, discriminatory policy. I'm confident the courts will rule against Donald Trump again soon. Until then, make sure he knows we're not backing down: "=\(null\&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utmmedium=email&utmsource=dnc&utmcontent=5+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utmcampaign=em20170306dncdc&source=em20170306dncdc") Thanks. Tom Tom Perez Chair Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Tom Perez
subject: re: Trump's new Muslim ban
body:
This is un-American.
---
**Donald Trump's Muslim ban is a dark moment in American history. Tell Trump to rescind this order immediately:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Muslim-Ban1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170306_tp2_nd&source=em_20170306_tp2_nd")**
Friend --

When Donald Trump signed his Muslim ban in January, millions of Americans spoke out to say that his ban did not represent us. We marched on the White House, called our representatives in Congress, and made our voices heard at airports around the country.

Today, Donald Trump signed a new version of the Muslim ban. His first ban took an incredible, inhumane toll on thousands of innocent people. **[As Democrats, we have a responsibility to fight back.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Muslim-Ban1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+As+Democrats+we+have+a+responsibility+to&utm_campaign=em_20170306_tp2_nd&source=em_20170306_tp2_nd")**

For those who quit their jobs, sold their homes and possessions, and left their lives behind to seek out a better life in this country only to be turned away at our borders, we must fight back.

For the five-year-old boy and the 90-year-old grandmother who were separated from their families and detained, alone, for hours, we must fight back.

For the sick people seeking medical treatment and the doctors coming to this country to treat them who were sent away, we must fight back.

For the brave men and women who risked their lives and their families' lives to help our troops, only to have us renege on our promise of a better life in the United States, we must fight back.

For the Muslim Americans who have borne the brunt of a new wave of anti-Muslim hate crimes in the wake of this ban, we must fight back.

**I've seen firsthand the difference we can make when we refuse to accept the hateful, immoral, unconstitutional actions of the Trump administration. Today, I'm asking you to join me and send Donald Trump a message loud and clear that we will not accept this new Muslim ban:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Muslim-Ban1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170306_tp2_nd&source=em_20170306_tp2_nd")**
Thank you,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c453/4067b0a/2d0447530/7e7f7365/3852560154/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170306_tp2_nd&source=em_20170306_tp2_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c453/4067b0a/2d0447530/7e7f7362/3852560154/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170306_tp2_nd&source=em_20170306_tp2_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c453/4067b0a/2d0447530/7e7f7363/3852560154/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170306_tp2_nd&source=em_20170306_tp2_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c453/4067b0a/2d0447530/7e7f7360/3852560154/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170306_tp2_nd&source=em_20170306_tp2_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Rapid Response (via VanHollen.org)
subject: just the same [executive order]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __ BREAKING: NEW MUSLIM BAN SIGNED BY PRESIDENT TRUMP, CHANGES LITTLE FROM THE FIRST.
[**Add your name to take action against it >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b03/70cdc2ba/474d3fef/397e591/2468438255/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-on-denounce-the-new-executive-order?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+to+take+action+against+it+&utm_campaign=em030617&source=em030617")
After a crazed weekend, full of unfounded and paranoid allegations that the Obama administration tapped his phone, President Trump has signed his long expected update to his Muslim ban.

The "revised" executive order is no more necessary - or less dangerous - than the first. It's a de-facto Muslim ban that makes America less safe by emboldening our enemies like ISIS, while dividing Americans and putting refugees in peril. Even Trump spokesman Sean Spicer has admitted that the new order is "tailored to achieve the same goals" and Trump himself has been on the record stating the new order changes "very little."

[**So today, while the ink is still drying, we 're asking all of Team Van Hollen to step up and sign our petition denouncing this "new" executive order.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b03/70cdc2ba/474d3fef/397e5ae/2468438255/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-on-denounce-the-new-executive-order?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+So+today+while+the+ink+is+still+drying+w&utm_campaign=em030617&source=em030617")

[Sign Now](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b03/70cdc2ba/474d3fef/397e5af/2468438255/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-on-denounce-the-new-executive-order?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Sign+Now&utm_campaign=em030617&source=em030617")

The Trump team's crusade against immigrants and Americans that oppose their agenda is unbridled. This afternoon there are even reports that Gold Star father Khizr Khan, an American citizen for over 30 years, was informed that his travel privileges are being reviewed; forcing him to cancel a scheduled speaking engagement in Toronto later this week.

[**We need to have at least 10,000 signatures by midnight tonight so we can send a clear message to the Trump administration that the people of Maryland and nationwide reject his anti-immigrant crusade and this repackaged executive order.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b03/70cdc2ba/474d3fef/397e5ac/2468438255/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-on-denounce-the-new-executive-order?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+We+need+to+have+at+least+10000+signature&utm_campaign=em030617&source=em030617")

This action is just the latest example of Trump's fear-mongering. We need to stand together in rejecting this new order which is against our core American values and will not "make America safe."

Thank you for acting.

Team Van Hollen

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

[www.vanhollen.org/donate](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b03/70cdc2ba/474d3fef/397e5ad/2468438255/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vanhollen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+wwwvanhollenorgdonate&utm_campaign=em030617&source=em030617")

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b03/70cdc2ba/474d3fef/397e5aa/2468438255/VEsA/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em030617&source=em030617") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.
